items.name: Big Breakfast
items.description: Eggs your way, bacon, sausage, grilled tomato, mushrooms, baked beans and toast

items.name: Bacon & Egg Roll
items.description: Crispy bacon, fried egg and your choice of sauce on a soft fresh roll

items.name: Eggs Benedict
items.description: Poached eggs and ham on an English muffin, topped with hollandaise sauce

items.name: Toast
items.description: Thick-cut toast served with your choice of spread — butter, jam or Vegemite

items.name: Burger
items.description: Beef patty, lettuce, tomato, pickles, cheese and house sauce in a toasted bun

items.name: Steak Sandwich
items.description: Grilled steak, caramelised onion, lettuce, tomato and aioli on toasted bread

items.name: Fish & Chips
items.description: Battered fish fillet, golden chips, tartare sauce and a wedge of lemon

items.name: Toasties
items.description: Classic toasted sandwich — ham & cheese, or ask about today's filling

items.name: Homemade Cakes
items.description: A rotating selection of freshly baked cakes made in-house — ask your server what's on today

items.name: Scones
items.description: Freshly baked scones served warm with jam and cream

items.name: Banana Bread
items.description: Moist house-baked banana bread, served warm with butter

items.name: Muffins
items.description: Freshly baked muffins — flavours change daily, always delicious

items.name: Flat White
items.description: Double espresso with velvety steamed milk and silky microfoam

items.name: Cappuccino
items.description: Espresso, steamed milk and thick velvety foam, dusted with chocolate

items.name: Latte
items.description: Smooth espresso with generous steamed milk and a light layer of foam

items.name: Chai Latte
items.description: Spiced chai concentrate with steamed milk — warming, fragrant and comforting

items.name: Milkshake
items.description: Thick and creamy milkshake — chocolate, strawberry or vanilla

items.name: Tea
items.description: Classic English Breakfast or herbal tea, served with milk and your choice of sweetener

items.name: Hot Chocolate
items.description: Rich and creamy hot chocolate, made with real cocoa and steamed milk
